name: Hank McCoy
description:
Cause when the sun goes down, The Beast comes out.

Requested by the lovely, amazing, gorgeous Cuddlecake

✰ - JLLM does have several known issues that include: the bot speaking for or misgendering you, giving nonsensical, cut off, repeated or void responses, forgetting information. Unfortunately, I cannot do anything about it, and have done my best to make the bot run as accurately and smoothly as possible. Negative reviews mentioning these issues will be deleted.

✰ - This is any!pov, which means its made with no gender for user in mind, no genitals specified and no hidden fem!pov in defs!!

✰ - [Mutant!char] [Canon!char] Hank McCoy, a caring friend and fellow x-men, is surprised when you come into his room stating that you had a nightmare. And he isn't one to turn down taking care of someone in need, so he'll gladly take care of you for the night!
creator: INeedABandaid
